displayName: Developer AI Tools: Aggregate Usage & Cost

text.content:
# ☕ Developer AI Tools: Aggregate Usage & Cost

This central dashboard provides real-time, comprehensive visibility into the aggregate usage, throughput, latencies, error rates, and estimated costs of Gemini models across the entire project.

### 🔍 Key Metrics Tracked
1. **Token Throughput:** Real-time prompt (input) and completion (output) token rates to monitor overall traffic scale.
2. **Invocations & Health:** API request volume grouped by Model ID and HTTP response codes (successes vs. error codes like 429s/5xx).
3. **Latencies (TTFT):** 95th Percentile Time-to-First-Token performance, capturing the direct developer responsiveness and performance experience.
4. **Estimated Spend:** Down-to-the-minute real-time and historical cost estimates based on direct token metrics scaled by Vertex AI list pricing.

### 💡 Using this Dashboard
* **Timeframe Selection:** Use the time picker in the top-right corner to view metrics over specific windows (e.g., last 1 hour, last 7 days). The summary tables and cost estimations automatically re-calculate totals over your chosen timeframe.
* **Error Monitoring:** Keep an eye on the *Quota / Rate Limit Exceeded* and *Response Codes* charts to identify if developers are experiencing rate limits (HTTP 429) or other API disruptions.

widgets.title: Token Consumption by Model and Type (Input vs. Output)
Total Tokens by Model and Type (Tabular Summary)

text.content:
### 💰 Real-Time Cost Estimation Note
The costs shown on this dashboard are **estimated** in real-time (USD). They are calculated by multiplying token consumption metrics by standard Vertex AI pricing:

* **Gemini 3.5 Flash:**
  * Input: USD 1.50 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000150)`)
  * Output: USD 9.00 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000900)`)
* **Gemini 3.1 Pro:**
  * Input: USD 2.00 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000200)`)
  * Output: USD 12.00 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00001200)`)
* **Gemini 1.5 & 2.5 Flash:**
  * Input: USD 0.075 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.000000075)`)
  * Output: USD 0.30 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000030)`)
* **Gemini 1.5 Pro:**
  * Input: USD 1.25 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000125)`)
  * Output: USD 5.00 / 1,000,000 tokens (`mul(0.00000500)`)

*Disclaimer: These calculations are for monitoring and tracking estimates only and do not reflect exact final Google Cloud billing invoices.*

**Note on Timeframes:** The "Total Estimated Cost (USD) by Model & Type" table is fully dynamic and responsive to the selected dashboard timeframe window. It uses the `outputFullDuration` option in combination with the `${__interval}` dynamic range vector to aggregate the estimated USD cost over the exact time frame you select in the dashboard's top-right time picker (e.g., Last 1 hour, Last 6 hours, Last 7 days).

widgets.title: Real-Time Estimated Cost (USD) by Model & Type (Over Time) [ESTIMATED COSTS]

timeSeriesQuery.prometheusQuery:
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.5-flash", type="input"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000150) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.5-flash", type="output"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000900) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.1-pro", type="input"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000200) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.1-pro", type="output"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00001200) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-flash", type="input"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.000000075) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-flash", type="output"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000030) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-pro", type="input"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000125) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-pro", type="output"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000500) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-2.5-flash", type="input"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.000000075) or
(sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-2.5-flash", type="output"}[1m])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000030)

widgets.title: Total Estimated Cost (USD) by Model & Type (Selected Timeframe) [ESTIMATED COSTS]

timeSeriesQuery.prometheusQuery:
label_replace(
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.5-flash", type="input"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000150) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.5-flash", type="output"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000900) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.1-pro", type="input"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000200) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-3.1-pro", type="output"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00001200) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-flash", type="input"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.000000075) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-flash", type="output"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000030) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-pro", type="input"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000125) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-1.5-pro", type="output"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000500) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-2.5-flash", type="input"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.000000075) or
  (sum(increase(aiplatform_googleapis_com:publisher_online_serving_token_count{model_user_id="gemini-2.5-flash", type="output"}[${__interval}])) by (model_user_id, type) * 0.00000030),
  "currency", "USD", "model_user_id", ".*"
)
